projects.name: Raintree Residences
projects.tagline: A quiet forest of teak, stone & sky
projects.description: Twenty-four architect-designed villas on Sarjapur's southern edge. Co-investment slots open against a registered partnership share, with exit at handover.

projects.name: Nandi Foothills Estate
projects.tagline: Land that works while you wait.
projects.description: Mango and sandalwood farmland at the foot of Nandi Hills. Sale deed registered directly in the investor's name. Annual dividend from crop yield plus land appreciation.

projects.name: Devanahalli Heights
projects.description: BDA-approved plotted development 8 km from Kempegowda International Airport. Investors register the plot directly and exit in tranches as the corridor re-prices.
highlights: Direct sale deed in your name

projects.name: Hebbal Skyline
projects.tagline: A tower for the north city.
projects.description: Thirty-six 3 & 4 BHK residences in a slender 22-floor tower overlooking Hebbal lake. Co-investment slots backed by a registered sale agreement on the underlying unit.

projects.name: Whitefield Enclave
projects.description: Closed in 32 months with a fully exited cohort. Investor IRR on this co-investment: 24.2% CAGR. All capital returned within 30 days of handover.

projects.name: Hoskote Acres
projects.description: BMRDA-approved plotted layout. All plots registered in investor names. Exited in tranches with average IRR of 23.8% CAGR.

projects.name: Kanakapura Grove
projects.description: Three mango harvests delivered, dividends paid every January. Land value appreciation: +58% since onboarding. 70% of investors still holding.

projects.name: Jubilee Row
projects.description: Twelve residences off Road No. 36. Fully exited at 21.6% IRR. Marked our first project in Hyderabad and the start of two-city operations.

testimonials.name: Anirudh & Meera Rao
testimonials.quote: They sourced the deal, ran the diligence, and registered the partnership in our name. We didn't visit the site once until handover — and the IRR came in two points above the memo.

testimonials.name: Vivek Narayan
testimonials.quote: I wanted real estate without becoming a real-estate person. The plot was registered in my name on day one, the quarterly updates were honest, and the exit was clean.

testimonials.name: Kavitha Reddy
testimonials.quote: Three mango harvests later, the dividend cheque shows up in January like clockwork. The land has nearly doubled. I'm in no hurry to exit.

testimonials.name: Ramesh & Aruna Setty
testimonials.quote: We've put money into three real-estate funds before. None of them showed us the title chain or let our lawyer read every page. Bricks On Top did both, before we'd even committed.

testimonials.name: Sandeep Menon · NRI investor
testimonials.quote: Third project for me. The FEMA paperwork, the repatriation route, the tax letter — they handled everything. From Singapore, that matters.

testimonials.name: Tara Krishnan · Family office
testimonials.quote: The diligence call with their legal counsel answered every question I had. No pitch deck, no pressure. Just the memo and the title chain.
